description.value: Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: All attribute dice: Add 2 to die results. Long and short rests provide no benefit..Target takes [[/damage 8]] damage each hour until the condition is removed. Recovery: [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of 4 hours (1 success). [[/check skill=medicine]] (rank 4 required, 2 successes) suppresses symptoms for 4 hours but does not cure. Antidote or magical healing required for full cure. See Medicine Applications.

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Poisoned (Deadly)
